Name: Average time from First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total time between First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation and SW-Reviewer Agreed across all variants containing both activities
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time from First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Reviewer Agreed in variants where SW-Reviewer Agreed eventually occurs
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average cycle time of First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation when followed by SW-Reviewer Agreed versus when followed by SW-Reviewer No Response
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Time elapsed from First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Reviewer Agreed in variants that lead to SW-EIC Accept compared to those leading to SW-EIC Reject
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average waiting time after First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation until the next reviewer-related activity (e.g., SW-Reviewer Agreed, SW-Reviewer Declined, or SW-Reviewer No Response)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total resolution time of First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation in cases where SW-Reviewer Agreed occurs within one week versus after more than one week
Metric: the sum of the function base < 7 where base is the duration between the first time instant when `ACTIVITY` == 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and the last time instant when `ACTIVITY` == 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time between First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation and SW-Reviewer Agreed in high-frequency variants versus low-frequency variants
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average time from First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Reviewer Agreed in variants that include reminder activities (e.g., Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 or 2) versus those that do not
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Time from First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation to SW-Reviewer Agreed grouped by case:concept:name to identify outlier manuscripts with unusually long or short durations
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'begin': activity == 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation'", 'end': "activity == 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'", 'aggregation': 'average', 'group_by': 'concept:name'}"
